positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial adventure. Central subject is a whimsical hot air balloon basket traversing a deep indigo night sky filled with glowing constellations and nebula clouds. The hot air balloon should have clean, geometric sails in muted golds, turquoise, and cream. Below, a stylized silhouette of rolling hills and deep forest lines the horizon. The overall aesthetic must be clean, high-contrast, and graphically powerful, utilizing strong color blocking and clean lines, reminiscent of mid-century modern poster art blended with bioluminescent fantasy. Perfect for direct apparel printing, vector style, centralized composition. Dramatic, cinematic lighting focusing on the glowing celestial elements. Vibrant yet cohesive color palette.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, smudge, noise, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logos, bokeh, messy, low contrast, grayscale, poor anatomy
